allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/dotnet/dotnet.exe" build "C:\\projects\\远程安装应用\\RemoteInstaller\\RemoteInstaller.csproj")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@192.168.60.153 "echo connected")

Bash(bash << 'EOFBASH'
# 模拟参数处理逻辑
HTTP_PORT=${HTTP_PORT:-9200}
CLUSTER_NAME=${CLUSTER_NAME:-my-cluster}
NODE_NAME=${NODE_NAME:-node-1}
MEMORY_LIMIT=${MEMORY_LIMIT:-2g}

echo "Default values:"
echo "HTTP_PORT: $HTTP_PORT"
echo "CLUSTER_NAME: $CLUSTER_NAME"
echo "NODE_NAME: $NODE_NAME"
echo "MEMORY_LIMIT: $MEMORY_LIMIT"

# 模拟环境变量
export HTTP_PORT=9201
export CLUSTER_NAME=test-cluster
export NODE_NAME=test-node
export MEMORY_LIMIT=4g

HTTP_PORT=${HTTP_PORT:-9200}
CLUSTER_NAME=${CLUSTER_NAME:-my-cluster}
NODE_NAME=${NODE_NAME:-node-1}
MEMORY_LIMIT=${MEMORY_LIMIT:-2g}

echo ""
echo "With env vars:"
echo "HTTP_PORT: $HTTP_PORT \(should be 9201\)"
echo "CLUSTER_NAME: $CLUSTER_NAME \(should be test-cluster\)"
echo "NODE_NAME: $NODE_NAME \(should be test-node\)"
echo "MEMORY_LIMIT: $MEMORY_LIMIT \(should be 4g\)"
EOFBASH)
